---
title: "Audiological Data — Summary Report"
date: today
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    max-width: 1600px
    self-contained: true
    output-file: summary_report.html
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(arsenal)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Load cleaned data
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
data_path <- file.path("..", "data", "clean_data.rds")
if (!file.exists(data_path)) data_path <- file.path("data", "clean_data.rds")

clean_data <- readRDS(data_path)

# Drop unused "Other" level for plots that compare Male vs Female only
dat_filtered <- droplevels(clean_data[clean_data$Sex != "Other", ])

# Helper: standard error of mean
std_error <- function(x) sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) / sqrt(sum(!is.na(x)))
```

## Descriptive statistics by tinnitus group

```{r arsenal-table, results = "asis"}
tab <- tableby(
  Group ~ Age + Sex + PTA4L + PTA4R,
  data          = clean_data,
  numeric.stats = c("mean","sd","range", "Nmiss"),
  cat.stats     = "countpct",
  test          = FALSE
)

# Wrap in a div so the width CSS below applies cleanly
cat('<div class="arsenal-wrapper">\n')
summary(tab,
        title  = "Descriptive statistics by tinnitus severity group",
        digits = 1)
cat('</div>\n')
```

```{=html}
<style>
  /* Adjust the percentage below to resize the descriptive-statistics table */
  .arsenal-wrapper {
    width: 75%;
    margin-left: auto;
    margin-right: auto;
  }
  .arsenal-wrapper table {
    width: 100% !important;
  }
</style>
```

---

## Age distribution by group and sex

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
![](../output/age_by_group_sex.svg)
:::

## Audiogram with UCL by tinnitus group

::: {style="text-align: center;"}
![](../output/audiogram.svg)
:::
